fields.summary: Vendor Admin - Add Section for "Upload/Replace Company Logo"

content.text: 📝 User Story: Add "Upload/Replace Company Logo" Section to Vendor Admin
I Want To: Upload or replace the company logo in the new Vendor Admin (both Edit and New forms)
So That: I can manage and update the company branding directly within the admin interface, mirroring the functionality from the old Vendor Admin.
AC1: A section labeled "Upload/Replace Company Logo" is present in both the Edit and New forms of the new Vendor Admin.
AC2: Users can upload PNG files as the company logo using this section.
AC3: The uploaded logo data is mirrored from the old Vendor Admin, ensuring consistency.
AC4: The section must allow replacing an existing logo with a new PNG file.
AC5: The feature is accessible and functions identically in both Edit and New forms.
Input: User navigates to the Edit Vendor form in the new Vendor Admin, selects "Upload/Replace Company Logo," and uploads a new PNG file.
Output: The new logo replaces the previous one, and the change is reflected in the Vendor Admin interface, matching the behavior of the old Vendor Admin.

In the Vendor Admin, add a Section for user to  "Upload/Replace Company Logo" from Old Vendor Admin to the New Vendor Admin to the Edit and New form as a section. Data should mirror from the Old Vendor Admin. User should be able to upload png files using this tool.
